feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content:
We have made all the necessary adaptations in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system. However, when opening the material and entering the accounting master data, we encounter an error. What could be the reason?

Best regards.

entry.title: Message mapping: How to handle empty parent node in source structure?
entry.content:
I am trying to do some message mapping but i am running into a serious problem with inconsistent data. Let me show an example:

<ROOT><Users><User><DataTop><DataMiddle><DataBottom>This is the value i need<DataBottom><DataMiddle><DataTop><User><Users><ROOT>

My mapping would just take the value from DataBottom and map it to whatever. The XML i work with has several User inside the Users tag. But sometimes a User is different, like this:

<User><DataTop><DataTop><User>

This is where the mapping gives me trouble. When trying to map DataBottom, this would just be skipped for this user, which would give incorrect data for all the following users completely ruining all my data. After some searching i found out that this is supposed to work like this due to the queues. 

How can i work around this? If one of the parent nodes is empty, i need to set a default value. I tried with some node functions, but they all get ignored on the DataBottom node, probably because that node cannot be reached when DataTop and DataMiddle do not exist.

entry.title: Issue with Oauth2 client credentials
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to establish oAuth2 connectivity between CPI and SuccessFactors. I am getting this error when I deploy the CPI interface using oAuth2 credentials.

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Error in retrieving Authorization header, cause: org.apache.http.client.HttpResponseException: status code: 401, reason phrase: {"errorHttpCode":"401","errorMessage":"Unable to verify the signature of the SAML assertion. Please ensure that the assertion has a signature and the key pairs match the client ID. For more information, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/4e27e8f6ae2748ab9f23228dd6a31b06.html."}

Any suggestions to resolve this issue ?

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Recovery of credential from SAP INTEGRATION SUITE
entry.content:
Hello Community of Integration Developers,

Recently, I faced a challenge when my SSH keys were accidentally deleted from the IS tenant. Despite my efforts, I was unable to recover them myself and was only able to retrieve the keys from a colleague. This situation raised an important question: While we store credentials daily in Security Material, Key Store, and PGP Keys, where exactly are these stored? Are they saved on SAP’s proprietary servers?

If any of these credentials are accidentally deleted, what options do we have for recovery? Is there a backup or recovery mechanism provided by SAP for such scenarios?

I would appreciate any insights or best practices regarding credential recovery in SAP Integration Suite.

Thank you.

SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: What are all the standard integration option SAP PM (ECC) has with Oracle Cloud Fusion?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus. 

Please help me understand all the standard integration option SAP ECC Plant Maintenance has with Oracle Cloud Fusion (Logistics, Finance and HR).

Your guidance will greatly help me be better prepared for my organization's upgradation from ECC to S4HANA.

Thanks.

entry.title: Getting ICMENOSESSION error while calling SAP S4 webservice from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are working on scenarios in SAP CPI to call SAP S4 webservice to get the data in request/reply way. There are multiple calls happening to S4 webservice using SOAP 1.x receiver adapter.

FLOW:  SAP CPI <-> SAP SCC <-> SAP S4 (on-prem)

Modernize RFC Receiver Communications into API-Based Protocols in Cloud Integration. Link to understand the scenario in details: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/modernize-rfc-receiver.html

In S4, webservice is linked to function module based on the request payload we are sending from CPI function module is getting executed based on the logic written in it then giving back the response immediately.

Problem statement:

  • Webservice calls are getting executed successfully for few initial calls. Some of the execution whole integration is getting executed successfully without failure.
    But sometimes suddenly getting failed with error: "org.apache.cxf.interceptor.Fault: Could not send Message., cause: org.apache.cxf.transport.http.HTTPException: HTTP response '400: Bad Request. <!-- This error page was generated by ICM (-)! -->
    <!-- Error code: ICMENOSESSION "
  • We are not able to see any logs in SRT_MONI or SXMB_MONI about this failure in S4. Also tried to check in SRT_UTIL but no luck.

From our end we have tried to execute the integration by doing multiple changes:

  • Made HTTP session reuse 'none' in CPI and enableSession parameter false in S4 wsdl setting. (KBA:

    https://me.sap.com/notes/0003419590)

  • Also tried to remove allow chunking in SAP CPI SOAP adapter configuration.
  • All cases we are throwing same error.

Please suggest further if you also encountered similar kind of issues. let me know possible resolution of this issue.

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Can the AS-2 adapter configured in CPI using Sender AS-2 adapter without the TPM.
entry.content: This is to receive EDI files from clients.

entry.title: Created an iFlow to receive a file and send it to an SFTP server
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I’ve created an iFlow in SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration) that is designed to receive a file and forward it to an SFTP server. The iFlow is deployed and seems to be working

 

When trying to test the API with CURL, I get an error.

curl -v -X POST https://xxxx-iflmap.hcisbp.us2.hana.ondemand.com/http/uploadSFTP -u s-user:pass -H "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" --data-binary "@archivo.txt"

Error: X-message-code: PWD_WRONG

Questions:

Can I use an s-user, or does it have to be a technical user?

What other possible causes could there be?

 

Thanks you

entry.title: I want to call all iflows in one package to an iflow .how?
entry.content: I am using URL from business acclerator hub. can you clear my doubt in clear way. I tried but i am getting DNS mismatch

entry.title: CPI Connection Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am facing an issue, when we are trying to connect a URL using request reply and getting the data using JSON format as body and no authentication we re getting java.net.UnknownHostException:xxxxxxxxxx: Name or service not known

But when we are trying the same via postman/SOAP UI application we are getting successful response.

Can you please help us in resolving the issue

@Yee3 @Sriprasadsbhat

entry.title: CPI SFTP Sender Filename Expression
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have got a requirement in CPI where I need the sftp sender adapter to poll all .pdf and .PDF files from a directory.

Can anyone provide some insight on how the filename field value should be provided at sftp adapter level so that it meets the requirement.

Thank you,

Aditya

entry.title: How to inspect memory usage in Cloud Integration?
entry.content:
Hi community,

According to the document, we can inspect system memory usage via the Inspect > Memory app. 

In the application, "Maximum Message Size" is shown in the right axis. This number indicates the messeage size, and not memory consumption over a given time period. Although Memory Exhaustions are displayed as a red line, we have no way to check the actual memory consumption unless memory is exhausted. 

Is there any way we can check the actual memory consumption in Cloud Integration?

entry.title: SAP Free tier limitations for Integration suite
entry.content:
Hi,

Referring to the SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776.

Need few information's regarding the Free Tier Service Plan for SAP Cloud Integration.

1. How many interfaces can be developed in the Free Tier Service Plan?

2. Does the Free Tier support Best Effort Communication mode (Synchronous Communication)?

3. What is the message volume that is permitted in the free tier service plan?

4. What are the other limitations in using the free tier service plan ?

Regards,

Senthil

entry.title: custom headers are not working in monitoring with wildcard charcters in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to store the salesforce ID values for each Salesorg, I have used addCustomHeaders function to store the values.

Since i get many records from salesforce all the ID values are stroed in CSV, during message monitoring i am unable to retrieve the message based on single ID value.

I tried giving * after the ID value, but still it was not showing the message with this search .
if i give the entire value i am able to see the message

can you help me how i could search with one ID if i have many ID values stored in custom header


Regards,
Saikumar

entry.title: Sender soap adapter not accepting "Encoding: UTF-8" for request-reply process.
entry.content:
Hi,
I have one interface which is connected Unifier to S4Hana. So, I am using SOAP to XI adapter. 
It's a request-reply mode, I need to send actual error message to sender system but from s4hana I am getting Encoding: UTF-8 message in the body that includes

Encoding: UTF-8
--uuid:0816c727-db39-4f8c-a05d-379f97a756b4 Content-Type: text/xml; charset=UTF-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-ID: <root.message@cxf.apache.org>
XML body
--uuid:0816c727-db39-4f8c-a05d-379f97a756b4--
So, because of the Encoding message source SOAP adapter not allowing the message to send sender side

Can anyone please give any suggestion to overcome this issue.

entry.title: How to access "Log Content" properties in content modifier.
entry.content:
I want to get "ErrorDetail" log content property from monitor to integration flow content modifier you can see below I have highlighted in red.

I have tried multiple ways to get this property like ${property.ErrorDetail}, ${exchangeProperty.ErrorDetail} but nothing has worked.
Can anyone please give any suggestions.

entry.title: Getting 401 unauthorized error while trying to post using HTTP and AS2 connection from partner end
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have been encountering 401 unauthorized error while testing from partner end for HTTP and AS2 connection.

I have used the basic authentication for sender AS2 and HTTP with necessary roles assigned. Valid Certificates were updated at both ends as well.

Can anyone provide me the possible reasons for 401 error and solutions for the same?

Note - The testing when performed with same credentials using postman was successful.

 

Thank you,

Aditya

entry.title: PDF Payload logging in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have got a requirement to log the PDF payload at the time of exception. I have tried the below script but the payload that got logged was not in PDF format but in .txt format.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
 
def Message processData(Message message)
{
def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
 
if(messageLog != null)
{
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Payload", body, "application/pdf");
}
 
return message;
}
 
Can anyone please provide a solution to this issue.
 
Thank You,
Aditya

entry.title: CPI Starter Mission - Unable to identify proxy for host
entry.content:
Following the starter mission at 

Request Product Details with an Integration Scenario | SAP Tutorials

And when it comes to test the API, I get a 404 : 

{
  "fault": {
    "faultstring": "Unable to identify proxy for host: default and url: /products/details",
    "detail": {
      "errorcode": "messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound"
    }
  }
}

As far as I can tell, everything is deployed, saved, active etc.

My iFlow is at
https://********btrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.ap21.hana.ondemand.com/shell/design/contentpackage/ZPDTrial/integrationflows/Trial2 Suite

I've seen a few other posts to the same effect, but  no useful responses, other than just "try again" which I've done to no avail...

Definitely echo other posters saying that this puts them off CPI ! Any help gratefully received!

entry.title: Local Integration Process Clarification
entry.content:
Dear All,

If we have a flow like below.

Main Integration Process (MIP)  -->  Local Integration Process 1 (LIP1)  --> LIP2

If I set any header in a groovy in LIP2 will this be available in LIP1 and MIP? My understanding is the headers are global in scope and all steps in an iFlow should be able to read and set them. I tried but LIP2 headers are not visible in LIP1. I also tried to define them in LIP1 first and set them in LIP2 but that also didn't help to read them in LIP1/MIP.

Also, what about the exception handling in LIP2 and LIP1? What is the best practice here? Is there any limitation if we have nested processes like this and is there any limit on them?
